reason: Brothers clash over inheritance, old wounds surface as they confront shared memories at a family home.
A barber and his estranged wife face old resentments when he returns home after she frames him for arson.
An eccentric director’s secret self-doubt erupts when forced to face his past and present in film.
Mayor’s convenience store inheritance forces him to partner with a con artist, unearthing sibling rivalries.
A mother’s illness reunites her daughters, revealing buried conflicts and regrets.
A man battles inner demons and family legacy after a stay at a women’s college merges past and present.
Three brothers survive war and return home to Ireland, haunted by shared trauma and conflicting loyalties.
A woman’s resurfaced memories of a traumatic past drive a wedge between her and her family.
A loner’s life upends when his daughter’s old nanny returns, dredging up buried familial secrets.
A man’s daughter reconnects with estranged father, and old resentments boil over during a holiday weekend.
